name: RL-Struct: A Lightweight Reinforcement Learning Framework for Reliable Structured Output in LLMs
summary: arXiv:2512.00319v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The Structure Gap between probabilistic LLM generation and deterministic schema requirements hinders automated workflows. We propose RL-Struct, a...
description: arXiv:2512.00319v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The Structure Gap between probabilistic LLM generation and deterministic schema requirements hinders automated workflows. We propose RL-Struct, a lightweight framework using Gradient Regularized Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a hierarchical reward function to align LLMs with structural constraints. This approach eliminates the critic network,...
author: Ruike Hu, Shulei Wu
